name: Bean and Chicken Burritos
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces Shredded reduced fat cheddar cheese (1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Spread 1/4 cup of refried beans evenly onto each tortilla.
3. Place 2 slices of chicken and 2 tablespoons of shredded cheese down the center, one-third of each tortilla; fold the sides over.
4. Place the folded side down on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 400°F for 6-8 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
6. Serve topped with lettuce and salsa.
Per serving: 240 cal., 15g pro., 32g carb., 5g fiber, 6g fat, 19mg chol., 890mg sod., 180mg pot., 2 starch and 1 1/2 lean meat exchanges.
